name: Brad's phone
subject: hitting the airwaves
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
| | | | Making sure you saw Lindsey's message for you. With our newest tv ad hitting airwaves this week, we need your help more than ever...

Sent from Brad's iPhone

_On Wednesday, August 22, 2018, Lindsey Miller wrote:_

Martin's record on clean energy is clear: He's brought new jobs and opportunities to New Mexico, and if re-elected, he'll continue fighting to make New Mexico a leader in energy innovation.

Our newest ad highlights Martin's vision, and that's why it's critical we reach our budget goal so we can purchase more airtime. Read more on our ad below, or **_[contribute here to keep our ad on the air!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-clean-energy-vision-ad?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+contribute+here+to+keep+our+ad+on+the+ai&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3")_**

* * *

Our latest ad focuses on clean energy, and it couldn't come at a more important time.

Martin knows clean energy is the future of New Mexico's economy, and he's fighting in the Senate to make New Mexico and our country leaders in 21st-century energy solutions that are not only good for our environment, but good for our economy too.

**But Martin 's opponents -- including Gary Johnson -- have made it clear they won't fight for New Mexico's renewable energy future in the Senate.**
**[FIGHT BACK](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-clean-energy-vision-ad?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+FIGHT+BACK&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3")** **That 's why we're proud to get Martin's newest ad on the air (_[you can watch it here](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-clean-energy-vision-ad?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+you+can+watch+it+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3")_).** But in response to Johnson's last-minute campaign, we've expanded our media budget and need to raise another $35,000 to buy more air time.

**_[That's why we need your help today. I just checked, and we only need to raise another $10,490 to reach our goal. Contribute now so Martin has what it takes to fight off attacks over the next 76 days and keep his ad on the air!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-clean-energy-vision-ad?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-++if+consfirstname++consfirstname++t+else&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3")_**
_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-clean-energy-vision-ad?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3")** **[Donate $29 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. Lindsey Miller,

**If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next,[sign up for text updates.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b6a0/43d8135f/67e7c349/51003afb/4093581756/VEsHBw/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/texts?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=12+-+sign+up+for+text+updates&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180822_2_3")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Blue Pennsylvania
subject: ANOTHER Republican ad just dropped
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e63eb/51dbcc2a/1fc7aac3/3a9ee59/325558736/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Congressman Barletta just dropped _another_ ad, team, and you'll never guess who's sharing his spotlight.

It wasn't working Pennsylvanians.

It wasn't seniors.

It wasn't students. [](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180822_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250") It was President Trump.

Once again, Lou Barletta has made the president the focus of his campaign. He's previously said that he's running to give the president the help he needs. He was one of the president's first supporters in Congress and even chaired his Pennsylvania campaign committee. He votes with the president _99% of the time_. **Congressman Barletta is running to be a rubber-stamp for President Trump, not to support Pennsylvania families.**

With Lou Barletta putting more and more ads on the air, we need to make sure that Bob Casey has the resources to keep up and fight back. **Bob needs to raise another $7,200 this week to avoid cutting his advertising budget -- can you make a donation right now to help close the gap?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180822_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180822_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180822_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180822_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Thanks.

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180822_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.

subject: Corruption has reached its peak.
body:
** Cohen. Manafort. Hunter.
------------------------------------------------------------

Over the past couple of days, we have seen three Republican leaders face charges all related to corruption in their financial dealings. With misuse of campaign funds in the case of Duncan Hunter, the illegal campaign contributions executed by Michael Cohen, and the personal corruption of Paul Manafort it is clear that there are some serious issues of corruption in Washington.

Corruption in Washington has reached its peak and it is critical that we all work together to fight the corruption. You can be a part of change today by donating (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=corruption&amount=50&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=4dbb1ea06d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_08_22_11_45&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-4dbb1ea06d-9291445) to our campaign. This race is on a razor's edge and any amount could be the difference in sending Ian Todd to Congress in November!

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Hey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
I want to send you a thank you in the mail. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek,

Election Day is only 76 days away, and we are working hard to make sure we elect Democrats up and down the ticket in every corner of Virginia this November. **That 's not just something I say - it's something we've built our entire campaign around.**

Virginia can help Democrats take back the Senate - and the House, too, by flipping some competitive congressional districts from red to blue this year. But doing that won't be easy, which is why we've set up the TK 4 VA Fund and why we're sending stickers as a thank you to folks who join. [So if you can, consider chipping in today >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12a8/3e0906/6cedb612/3e36a62e/468954399/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-round-sticker?refcode=20180822_4_FR_TK_Sticker-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+So+if+you+can+consider+chipping+in+today&utm_campaign=20180822_4_FR_TK_Sticker-LDND&source=20180822_4_FR_TK_Sticker-LDND") | [**Contribute $5 today**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12a8/3e0906/6cedb612/3e36a62d/468954399/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-round-sticker?refcode=20180822_4_FR_TK_Sticker-LDND&amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Contribute++if+contributionhpc+or+hpc++h&utm_campaign=20180822_4_FR_TK_Sticker-LDND&source=20180822_4_FR_TK_Sticker-LDND")
---
My team and I appreciate every time and every way you choose to step up and support my campaign for Senate. And you know we have to keep asking for help, Derek, because that's what it takes to win big. **But this time, we wanted to make sure we could give you a little token of our appreciation.**

Couldn't do this without you. Thank you.

_Tim_

_P.S. I really think you 'll like the sticker. It's pretty cool. [Check it out, and chip in to get it for free >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12a8/3e0906/6cedb612/3e36a62c/468954399/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-round-sticker?refcode=20180822_4_FR_TK_Sticker-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Check+it+out+and+chip+in+to+get+it+for+f&utm_campaign=20180822_4_FR_TK_Sticker-LDND&source=20180822_4_FR_TK_Sticker-LDND")_

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Preventing Single-Payer Healthcare
body:
Dear Friend,
Republicans have an opportunity and obligation to lead. That is the consequence of winning elections.
Republicans’ failure to address rising health-care costs when they were last in the majority led directly to Obamacare, and their failure to act today will result in a single-payer system. It all seems fine now, but remember this moment if and when we get single-payer.

Republicans refuse to learn the hard lesson that they will never outspend Democrats or sate their appetite for government largesse.
I hope you take the time to read my most recent piece below on preventing a single-payer healthcare system.

Bobby
* * *

**Preventing Single-Payer**

National Review | Bobby Jindal
Democrats point to the supposedly existential threat of climate change and the nation’s allegedly inhumane immigration system as reasons to give them control of Congress this November. Yet their failure to prioritize these issues and pass legislation when they controlled the White House, the Senate, and the House during Obama’s first two years in office belie their seriousness. Republicans are currently demonstrating a similar hypocrisy by failing to act on their supposed political priorities, including repealing Obamacare and reducing federal spending and borrowing. Even more dangerously, Republican failure to advance significant conservative solutions to the problems voters care about is setting the stage for Democratic overreach.

Merely enacting temporary tax cuts and repealing some of Obama’s regulations will slow down, but not reverse, the expanding role of government. Reagan was the last Republican president to disrupt the march of progressivism; the Gingrich Congress’s welfare reform was the last significant victory. A majority of voters still prefer effective conservative market-based solutions to their real-world problems, but they will settle for government subsidies and dictates as a second-best solution if Republicans fail to offer an alternative. Republicans’ failure to address rising health-care costs when they were last in the majority led directly to Obamacare, and their failure to act today will result in a single-payer system. It all seems fine now, but remember this moment if and when we get single-payer.

[Read more...](http://wc4.net/t?r=4673&c=8367&l=203&ctl=1FDA3:C15079EF2606CA7C7AB4AF12ABA54B39696548644412C47B&)

* * *

[Unsubscribe](http://wc4.net/u?id=C15079EF2606CA7C7AB4AF12ABA54B39696548644412C47B)
---

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Help Sen. Tina Smith flip the Senate blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
**Friends, CNN says Minnesota is "ground zero" for Democrats this November, and we can't take back the Senate without holding this Minnesota Democratic Senate seat, so my friend Tina Smith needs our immediate support. **
Minnesota is a MUST WIN to flip the Senate blue and protect _everything, _from affordable health care to women's rights, that Trump's dangerous agenda looks to gut.

That's why Republicans are going all-in, but Tina can't stand up to the deep pockets of the GOP alone. She's counting on this grassroots team to step up and help her raise another $10,000 by midnight to fuel her fight across the finish line.

**I know how important grassroots supporters like you are. But we're falling short of our goal right now, so I'm counting on you to step up now to ****power Tina to victory and lock in this critical state. Will you give**** $5 - or whatever you can - right now to help Tina win in Minnesota and flip the Senate blue?**

____If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be evenly split between Tina Smith and Jeanne Shaheen:____ **[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4ts?refcode=jtk872-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4ts?refcode=jtk872-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4ts?refcode=jtk872-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4ts?refcode=jtk872-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you for chipping in today,
Jeanne

name: Heidi L. =?UTF-8?Q?Sieck=2C=20=23VOTEPROCHOICE?=
subject: On August 26, we #StopKavanaugh
body:
On August 26 send a message to Senate Democrats to oppose Kavanaugh’s criminal confirmation | | | [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/Sufq1/6/t6/r5cs/61AA9B/6ickrjrvHz/P/P) |
---|---
| | Dear Activist,
Trump was formally implicated in a criminal conspiracy this week. **Yet, he is _still_ determined to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court and reverse _Roe v. Wade_. **
**We must do everything possible to block Kavanaugh’s nomination and protect our reproductive freedom.** Senate Judiciary hearings for Kavanaugh are still scheduled for September 4-6, and if confirmed, Kavanaugh could be on the Supreme Court by October 1.

** _[This Sunday, we can TAKE ACTION to #StopKavanaugh.](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/Sufq1/s/pv/r5cs/61AA9B/6FyiNmxlC9/P/P "Link: http://bit.ly/2OGYSz6")_** |
---|---
| | [ ](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/Sufq1/v/pv/r5cs/61AA9B/c6IJhaJzw/P/P) |
---|---
| | **Together, we can urge our senators to #VOTEPROCHOICE and stop Kavanaugh.** On Tuesday, Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer met with Kavanaugh: “I asked him if he agreed that _Roe v. Wade_ and _Casey v. Planned Parenthood_ were correctly decided,” Minority Leader Chuck Schumer told reporters. “He would not say yes. **That should send shivers down the spine of any American who believes in reproductive freedom for women.”** |
---|---
| | Kavanaugh is definitely sending shivers down our spines. **And yet 28 Democrat senators have _not_ declared that they will vote against Kavanaugh. **To block his nomination, we need all Democrats (and two Republicans) to vote against him. _**[Clearly, they need a reminder. This Sunday, August 26, we take to the streets at Unite for Justice events across the country.](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/Sufq1/z/pv/r5cs/61AA9B/vx9pXhnVES/P/P "Link: http://bit.ly/2OGYSz6")

[RSVP now to join us.](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/Sufq1/U/pv/r5cs/61AA9B/vjILNbAy9a/P/P "Link: http://bit.ly/2OGYSz6")**_ |
---|---
| | [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/Sufq1/j/pv/r5cs/61AA9B/6J5kKnA6eX/P/P) |
---|---
| | **We don't have a moment to lose** —that's why showing up in record numbers this weekend will send the message to Senate Democrats to oppose Kavanaugh's confirmation. Our friends from NARAL, MoveOn, and dozens of other progressive groups will be rallying this Sunday, August 26. Events are happening in all 50 states, and it's important we get out in the streets to **#StopKavanaugh**.

_**[RSVP NOW to take part in the nation-wide protest!](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/Sufq1/5/pv/r5cs/61AA9B/veujJhW4e9/P/P "Link: http://bit.ly/2OGYSz6")**_

Thank you for standing with us. Together we can stop Kavanaugh and protect reproductive freedom in this country.
In solidarity, Heidi
_**Heidi L. Sieck**_
Co-founder/CEO
#VOTEPROCHOICE P.S.—Want to learn more about Brett Kavanaugh and the future of the Supreme Court? We're holding a livestream on Friday at 1:00 PM EST. _**[Tune in on Facebook or join the Blue Wave voters Facebook Group to ask a question!](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/Sufq1/r/pz/r5cs/61AA9B/euOkB45W2/P/P "Link: https://www.facebook.com/groups/bluewavevoters")**_ |

clean_body: On August 26 send a message to Senate Democrats to oppose Kavanaugh’s criminal confirmation | | | | ---|--- | | Dear Activist, Trump was formally implicated in a criminal conspiracy this week. Yet, he is still determined to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court and reverse Roe v. Wade. We must do everything possible to block Kavanaugh’s nomination and protect our reproductive freedom. Senate Judiciary hearings for Kavanaugh are still scheduled for September 4-6, and if confirmed, Kavanaugh could be on the Supreme Court by October 1. "Link: " | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | Together, we can urge our senators to #VOTEPROCHOICE and stop Kavanaugh. On Tuesday, Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer met with Kavanaugh: “I asked him if he agreed that Roe v. Wade and Casey v. Planned Parenthood were correctly decided,” Minority Leader Chuck Schumer told reporters. “He would not say yes. That should send shivers down the spine of any American who believes in reproductive freedom for women.” | ---|--- | | Kavanaugh is definitely sending shivers down our spines. And yet 28 Democrat senators have not declared that they will vote against Kavanaugh. To block his nomination, we need all Democrats (and two Republicans) to vote against him. "Link: " "Link: " | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | We don't have a moment to lose —that's why showing up in record numbers this weekend will send the message to Senate Democrats to oppose Kavanaugh's confirmation. Our friends from NARAL, MoveOn, and dozens of other progressive groups will be rallying this Sunday, August 26. Events are happening in all 50 states, and it's important we get out in the streets to #StopKavanaugh. "Link: " Thank you for standing with us. Together we can stop Kavanaugh and protect reproductive freedom in this country. In solidarity, Heidi Heidi L. Sieck Co-founder/CEO #VOTEPROCHOICE P.S.—Want to learn more about Brett Kavanaugh and the future of the Supreme Court? We're holding a livestream on Friday at 1:00 PM EST. name: Jill Long Thompson
subject: Why I’m Supporting Mel Hall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

Running for office is hard, but working in Congress is even harder. Having done both, I feel strongly we must elect Mel Hall to the U.S. House.

To do it right, you need to have strong ideals, and a willingness to stick to them, no matter how much Washington tests you. Hoosiers aren't afraid of hard work, and I know Mel is up to the challenge, and he will never forget his duty to faithfully represent us.

**[Friends, I'm asking you to join me in standing with Mel. Please chip in $5 now to propel Mel to victory this November.](https://act.myngp.com/el/4f9aayG3ZN5qPae7hVQIohlvoeLJIAnNjiKSncCMzpw=/MXD31iBomywQ-2GUZZ89-7dyz-WoRHc7Dc9vDgKWZT0=?refcode=em180823_jlt)**

I'm supporting Mel because he believes that people who are willing to work hard deserve a chance to succeed. As a minister he focused on the values of community and opportunity. As leader of Press Ganey he showed his commitment to equality and fairness. His campaign for Congress is just one more example of his dedication to the people of northern Indiana.

These are values I know we all share, and I know he'll make a great representative for the people of the 2nd District.

**If you believe as I do, then please contribute now to send Mel to Congress and flip this district blue.**

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: First Air Force Medal of Honor since the Vietnam War
body:
| |
---
The White House • August 23, 2018
## The Day Ahead
##
President Donald J. Trump will participate in a roundtable on the Foreign Investment Risk Review Modernization Act, which will both protect national security and preserve America’s longstanding policy of open investment.
## First Air Force Medal of Honor since the Vietnam War
##
**Yesterday, President Trump presented the Medal of Honor** to a fallen hero, Technical Sergeant John A. Chapman of the United States Air Force, who died serving in Afghanistan 16 years ago. Sergeant Chapman is the first member of the U.S. Air Force to receive the Medal of Honor since the Vietnam War. **On March 4, 2002** , on Takur Ghar mountain in Afghanistan, Sergeant Chapman’s aircraft came under heavy enemy fire and was hit by a rocket-propelled grenade. One teammate was ejected from the aircraft, and the crippled helicopter crash landed in the valley below. Sergeant Chapman and the remaining joint special operations team members voluntarily returned to the snow-capped mountain—into the heart of a known enemy stronghold—in an attempt to rescue their stranded teammate. **Sergeant Chapman charged** into enemy fire through harrowing conditions, seized an enemy bunker, and killed its enemy occupants. Despite severe wounds, he continued to fight relentlessly, sustaining a violent engagement with multiple enemy personnel before paying the ultimate sacrifice. Sergeant Chapman’s heroic actions, at the cost of his life, are credited with saving the lives of his teammates. **“Our nation is rich with blessings,”** President Trump said yesterday. “But our greatest blessings of all are the patriots like John.” **[See President Trump award the Medal of Honor.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODIzLjkzOTk2MzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyMy45Mzk5NjMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc1NTgzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1032369794333339648) ** **Promises kept** : **[How the President is honoring his commitment to veterans](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODIzLjkzOTk2MzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyMy45Mzk5NjMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc1NTgzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-administration-honoring-commitment-nations-veterans/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **
# Vice President to update on America in space
**Vice President Mike Pence** will visit NASA’s Johnson Space Center in Houston today, where he will update Americans about the Trump Administration’s work to put human exploration back at the core of our national space program. **A big part of that mission** is returning NASA to the Moon, which will serve as a forerunner to future human missions to Mars. **President Trump says** **America will once again lead** the world in the exploration and development of space. Earlier this year, the Administration unveiled a National Space Strategy to accomplish just that, refocusing our space program by more closely linking its work to both American national security and American strength. [**Watch the Vice President’s remarks on America in space live at 1:45 p.m. ET.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODIzLjkzOTk2MzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyMy45Mzk5NjMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc1NTgzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/live/) **Get the facts** : **[President Trump’s “America First” National Space Strategy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODIzLjkzOTk2MzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyMy45Mzk5NjMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc1NTgzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-unveiling-america-first-national-space-strategy/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **
# President Trump to Hawaii: ‘Please prepare yourselves’
#
**President Trump is deeply concerned** for the wellbeing of all Hawaiians as Hurricane Lane continues to threaten the islands. Lane is expected to produce total rain accumulations of 10 to 15 inches with isolated maximum rain amounts of 20 inches across the state. **Yesterday, the President approved** an [**emergency declaration**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODIzLjkzOTk2MzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyMy45Mzk5NjMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc1NTgzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-approves-hawaii-emergency-declaration/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) for the State of Hawaii, ordering federal assistance to supplement state and local response efforts. “Everyone in the path of #HurricaneLane please prepare yourselves, heed the advice of State and local officials, and follow @NWSHonolulu for updates,” the President tweeted. “Be safe!” [**Be informed: What to do before, during, and after a hurricane**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODIzLjkzOTk2MzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyMy45Mzk5NjMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc1NTgzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.ready.gov/hurricanes)

clean_body: | | The White House • August 23, 2018 The Day Ahead President Donald J. Trump will participate in a roundtable on the Foreign Investment Risk Review Modernization Act, which will both protect national security and preserve America’s longstanding policy of open investment. First Air Force Medal of Honor since the Vietnam War Yesterday, President Trump presented the Medal of Honor to a fallen hero, Technical Sergeant John A. Chapman of the United States Air Force, who died serving in Afghanistan 16 years ago. Sergeant Chapman is the first member of the U.S. Air Force to receive the Medal of Honor since the Vietnam War. On March 4, 2002 , on Takur Ghar mountain in Afghanistan, Sergeant Chapman’s aircraft came under heavy enemy fire and was hit by a rocket-propelled grenade. One teammate was ejected from the aircraft, and the crippled helicopter crash landed in the valley below. Sergeant Chapman and the remaining joint special operations team members voluntarily returned to the snow-capped mountain—into the heart of a known enemy stronghold—in an attempt to rescue their stranded teammate. Sergeant Chapman charged into enemy fire through harrowing conditions, seized an enemy bunker, and killed its enemy occupants. Despite severe wounds, he continued to fight relentlessly, sustaining a violent engagement with multiple enemy personnel before paying the ultimate sacrifice. Sergeant Chapman’s heroic actions, at the cost of his life, are credited with saving the lives of his teammates. “Our nation is rich with blessings,” President Trump said yesterday. “But our greatest blessings of all are the patriots like John.” Promises kept : Vice President to update on America in space Vice President Mike Pence will visit NASA’s Johnson Space Center in Houston today, where he will update Americans about the Trump Administration’s work to put human exploration back at the core of our national space program. A big part of that mission is returning NASA to the Moon, which will serve as a forerunner to future human missions to Mars. President Trump says America will once again lead the world in the exploration and development of space. Earlier this year, the Administration unveiled a National Space Strategy to accomplish just that, refocusing our space program by more closely linking its work to both American national security and American strength. name: Tom Wolf
subject: Will you sign Frances' birthday card?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hello,

My wife Frances isn't just the love of my life. She's been my partner and best friend for more than 40 years.

So to say thank you for all that Frances does for our family and the people of Pennsylvania, my daughters and I want to invite you to sign Frances' birthday card before we give it to her.

**[Will you add your name to Frances' birthday card today?](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec08d/73a2bc12/2645eeb0/1fce498e/617375723/VEsH/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/frances-wolf-birthday?gpsid=8_50_3014&refcode=em18_180823_bday2_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180823_bday2_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+add+your+name+to+Frances+birthd")** | [](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec08d/73a2bc12/2645eeb0/1fce498d/617375723/VEsE/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/frances-wolf-birthday?gpsid=8_50_3014&refcode=em18_180823_bday2_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180823_bday2_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=2")
---
Over the last few years, Frances and I have met so many incredible people across Pennsylvania, and heard their stories.

I know she keeps their stories in her heart, because she's always quick to share them with me.

So on her birthday, I want to make sure she knows that people like you are thinking about her too. I'm sure her face will light up when she sees your name and message.

**Will you help me make Frances' birthday special? Add your name to her card now -- and feel free to add a note of your own:**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Frances-Wolf-Birthday](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec08d/73a2bc12/2645eeb0/1fce498c/617375723/VEsF/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/frances-wolf-birthday?gpsid=8_50_3014&refcode=em18_180823_bday2_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180823_bday2_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=3+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomFrancesWolfBirthd")**

Thank you for being a part of this team and our family,

Tom

Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
Contributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec08d/73a2bc12/2645eeb0/1fce49b3/617375723/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/changeaddress?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em18_180823_bday2_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx&source=em18_180823_bday2_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx")
We believe that emails are an important way for the campaign to stay in contact with supporters like you. This campaign appreciates any feedback you might have -- positive or negative. [Click here](mailto:info@wolfforpa.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact the campaign with any questions, concerns, or ideas. [Click here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec08d/73a2bc12/2645eeb0/1fce49b2/617375723/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=5+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em18_180823_bday2_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx&source=em18_180823_bday2_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx") if you would like to unsubscribe from Tom Wolf for Governor email updates.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: UPDATE: Nevada Senate poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catherine Cortez Masto for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friends -

My friend Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto said I could reach out after a recent poll came out showing us trailing my opponent by 1 point. The Washington Post reported that Nevada is Democrats' "best pickup opportunity" in the Senate. It's clear that we have zero path to the Senate majority if we lose here in November.

That's why this latest news from my team is so incredible: A generous group of donors has offered to match **[every dollar donated before our critical end-of-month](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e55ed/688a0c21/50fd3b69/73af060a/2164124936/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiY2NtNGpyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxOTE1LWJ1LW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ccm4jr?refcode=jtk1915-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** deadline to help us close the gap. **[Click here to get us over the top, help us win in Nevada, turn the Senate blue, and fight to protect the future of the Supreme Court.](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e55ed/688a0c21/50fd3b69/73af060a/2164124936/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiY2NtNGpyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxOTE1LWJ1LW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ccm4jr?refcode=jtk1915-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

In a race this close, every gift could be the difference between winning or losing - between flipping the Senate blue or handing Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell another two years of GOP control and the power to decide the future of the Supreme Court. The GOP is going all in to win in Nevada and save its Senate majority, so we can't afford to lose momentum now. **Four McConnell-linked groups are even spending $16 million against us.**

**Please, I need every single grassroots supporter who cares about standing up to the GOP and taking back the Senate majority to step up today, before it's too late.[Please, give $5 and have every dollar DOUBLED to help us win in Nevada, retake the Senate, and fight to protect the future of the Supreme Court.](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e55ed/688a0c21/50fd3b69/73af060a/2164124936/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiY2NtNGpyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxOTE1LWJ1LW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ccm4jr?refcode=jtk1915-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Kate Ramstad
subject: 20 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Hi friend,
**There are just 20 DAYS until the Democratic Primary, and we need your help!** We are working every single day to re-elect Governor Gina Raimondo and keep Rhode Island's comeback going, but **all of our progress is at risk.** Gina's opponents have promised to reverse the policies that have led to our gains, turning back the clock years and threatening to take us back to the worst unemployment in America.
**[Will you stand up for Rhode Island by donating $24 or as much as you can right now???](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0e6/5e076a9e/5409d215/14425a17/836338484/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=180823")**
Thank you,
Kate
Kate Ramstad
Finance Director

\-------

name: Team Maggie
subject: Hold the Trump administration accountable for criminal acts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc00d/2a380d31/32efb124/f1b061/1135662151/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc00d/2a380d31/32efb124/f1b061/1135662151/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
It's been an eventful couple of days, everyone:
* A jury found Paul Manafort, Donald Trump's former campaign chairman, guilty of eight felonies.
* Michael Cohen, Trump's personal lawyer, pleaded guilty to eight separate felonies and stated -- under oath -- that his actions were at the direction of the candidate.

This is likely just the tip of the iceberg, so we're doubling down on our support for leaders who will hold Donald Trump, his campaign, and his administration accountable for this corruption. [**Will you sign our pledge to support the Democrats and leaders who will force President Trump to answer for these criminal acts?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc00d/2a380d31/32efb124/f1b062/1135662151/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/201808_Cohen-Manafort-Hunter?source=e20180823_MCpetition_6m&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
As a clear pattern of corruption and criminality emerges, we as citizens must continue to hold the Trump administration's feet to the fire, and investigations regarding President Trump and his associates must be allowed to continue without any interference from Trump or those around him.
**Trump will fight this at every turn, so we need to make our voices clear:[Please add your name to urge Majority Leader Mitch McConnell to protect the Special Counsel investigating the Trump administration and hold the President accountable.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc00d/2a380d31/32efb124/f1b063/1135662151/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/201808_Cohen-Manafort-Hunter?source=e20180823_MCpetition_6mo&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
Moments like this are when your voice matters the most, so _please_ make sure that you join the thousands of people demanding answers and accountability.
-- Team Maggie

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc00d/2a380d31/32efb124/f1b06c/1135662151/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: I’m asking you to add your name in support of a bold proposal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
|
#
Peter -- There was a time when America was willing to take on big, ambitious projects -- and that’s something I think we need to do more of if we’re going to solve the tough problems facing our communities. [**That’s why I’m asking you to add your name in support of my proposal to task the Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA) with helping to make sure everyone in our state has access to quality broadband internet.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1983909/10354286/1035050662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzA0MmU3Yy0wYWE3LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uMO_OSIBGhyayNxV6nV-oG_FnZKaMJJPu-i0-k5lYPc=) | | [Sign the petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1983910/10354287/1035050662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzA0MmU3Yy0wYWE3LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uMO_OSIBGhyayNxV6nV-oG_FnZKaMJJPu-i0-k5lYPc=)
---
**In today’s world, the internet is now as vital as telephones, or electric power, or roads, or water and sewer services -- it’s a fifth utility.**
We use the internet to stay connected and informed, to shop, and to communicate with friends and family. It’s a necessity for every business, which puts any community without reliable broadband internet access at an economic disadvantage.
**Almost 10% of the population in Tennessee does not have access to basic broadband internet. In some rural counties, it’s as high as 80%.** That affects a community’s quality of life and its ability to attract and retain jobs.
A century ago, we faced similar challenges with telephone and electric services. Especially in rural areas, it just wasn’t economically feasible for private operators to invest in these services. And yet we considered it an important value for every American to have access to basic infrastructure.
In Tennessee, the TVA helped solve the problem. Today, we know the TVA mostly as a producer of electricity. But when the TVA was created by Congress in the 1930s, its original mission was not just rural electrification, but also economic development.
**In this day and age, nothing is more vital to rural economic development than ensuring broadband internet access.**
[**More than 80 years after Congress created the TVA, now is the time for the TVA to step up once again -- this time to help expand broadband internet access. If you agree, I’m asking you to add your name to show your support for this bold proposal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1983911/10354288/1035050662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzA0MmU3Yy0wYWE3LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uMO_OSIBGhyayNxV6nV-oG_FnZKaMJJPu-i0-k5lYPc=)
| [Sign the petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1983912/10354289/1035050662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzA0MmU3Yy0wYWE3LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uMO_OSIBGhyayNxV6nV-oG_FnZKaMJJPu-i0-k5lYPc=)
---
In the 1950s, Dwight Eisenhower committed us to build an interstate highway system. He didn’t fool around the edges. He didn’t say, “Let’s do a tax credit here, some government grants over there.”
**He said, “We’re going to build an interstate highway system” -- and we got it done.**
[**If you agree It’s time for America to resurrect that same confidence and willingness to go big -- like putting the TVA to work on making sure everyone in our state can access our fifth utility -- I’d appreciate your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1983913/10354290/1035050662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzA0MmU3Yy0wYWE3LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uMO_OSIBGhyayNxV6nV-oG_FnZKaMJJPu-i0-k5lYPc=)

clean_body: | Peter -- There was a time when America was willing to take on big, ambitious projects -- and that’s something I think we need to do more of if we’re going to solve the tough problems facing our communities. = | | = In today’s world, the internet is now as vital as telephones, or electric power, or roads, or water and sewer services -- it’s a fifth utility. We use the internet to stay connected and informed, to shop, and to communicate with friends and family. It’s a necessity for every business, which puts any community without reliable broadband internet access at an economic disadvantage. Almost 10% of the population in Tennessee does not have access to basic broadband internet. In some rural counties, it’s as high as 80%. That affects a community’s quality of life and its ability to attract and retain jobs. A century ago, we faced similar challenges with telephone and electric services. Especially in rural areas, it just wasn’t economically feasible for private operators to invest in these services. And yet we considered it an important value for every American to have access to basic infrastructure. In Tennessee, the TVA helped solve the problem. Today, we know the TVA mostly as a producer of electricity. But when the TVA was created by Congress in the 1930s, its original mission was not just rural electrification, but also economic development. In this day and age, nothing is more vital to rural economic development than ensuring broadband internet access. = | = In the 1950s, Dwight Eisenhower committed us to build an interstate highway system. He didn’t fool around the edges. He didn’t say, “Let’s do a tax credit here, some government grants over there.” He said, “We’re going to build an interstate highway system” -- and we got it done. = | = I’m applying for the job to be Tennessee’s U.S. Senator and to take this on. —Phil Bredesen Paid for by Bredesen for Senate Bredesen for Senate P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209 United States

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Trump does not have a "get out of jail free" card
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
I will not hesitate to hold Trump accountable.
#

Peter -
Paul Manafort's conviction and Michael Cohen's plea were a major win, but now there is justified concern that Trump could start handing out self-serving pardons to protect himself.
But here's the thing: Trump's pardon power is not unlimited. He does not have a "get out of jail free" card to give his cronies. His pardons do not extend to state crimes -- meaning that, while there are some legal limits, the next New York Attorney General can and must be prepared to investigate state-level crimes to the full extent possible.
As the next Attorney General, I will not hesitate to hold Trump accountable because no one is above the law. But I cannot do this alone:
**[Will you make a $3 donation to our campaign today? We're up against powerful people and wealthy interests who don't want me anywhere near this office, but your support helps us fight back.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780930/6e822e2f/1adc78bc/4172514c/3214173667/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MjMtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-august?refcode=em180823-full")**
New York's next Attorney General must be a firewall against Trump and his cronies' lawlessness and corruption.
Trump's businesses, foundation and campaign are all based in New York, and this week has made it clear that the lines between each have been blurred. We know that these organizations need to be investigated. That means our next Attorney General has an incredibly important role to play in leading those investigations and, where necessary, prosecuting criminal actions.
I am ready to lead that fight. I wrote the book on corruption and helped create the legal strategy behind the emoluments lawsuit against Trump.
Corruption 101 is to follow the money -- whether that's Trump's foreign emoluments or the corporate money that is poisoning our democracy. The corrupting influence of money has always been clear, and it's why I've rejected all corporate money.
**[That's why your $3 donation is so important. We're facing the political and financial establishment's hand-picked candidates. They want to buy this election with corporate money, but if you're with us here, we will win.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780930/6e822e2f/1adc78bc/4172514c/3214173667/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MjMtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-august?refcode=em180823-full")**
This is a crisis moment for our democracy and our country. But I'm confident that together we can get justice for the people.
All my best,
Zephyr
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780930/6e822e2f/1adc78bc/4172514c/3214173667/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MjMtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-august?refcode=em180823-full")

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: poll closures [update]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
These poll closures will make it harder for thousands of Georgians to get out and vote on Election Day. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9b0/34a064cc/d6fd5b1/70ee6bf/1728015798/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friends - You've probably heard that Randolph County is considering a plan to close 7 out of 9 polling locations. These poll closures will make it harder for thousands of Georgians to get out and vote on Election Day. Voter suppression can be stopped, but it takes contacting voters directly, and that's not cheap. **[We must redouble our voter outreach efforts NOW to ensure every Georgian knows how important it is to cast a ballot and make their voice heard. Will you support our field team with a $3 donation?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9b0/34a064cc/d6fd5b1/70ee6bc/1728015798/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODIzMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE082318-full")** Randolph County is predominantly Black and rural. Its poverty rate is twice the national average. Inadequate public transportation in the county would force some voters to travel over 30 miles by foot to exercise their right to vote. This is unacceptable, but it is nothing new. For generations, communities of color and rural areas have been the most affected by voter suppression and disenfranchisement. We should be breaking down barriers to the ballot box, not putting up roadblocks. Stories from places like Randolph County shouldn't discourage us. Instead, they should motivate us to fight even harder! No vote will go uncounted, no matter how hard they try. **Our team is ready to fight back. We have 75 days left to reach out to voters in all 159 counties and give them a reason to cast a ballot in November. Support our efforts with a donation here:** **[http://secure.staceyabrams.com/VoterOutreach](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9b0/34a064cc/d6fd5b1/70ee6bc/1728015798/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODIzMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE082318-full")** By turning out voters in every region of the state and mobilizing those who have been left out and left behind, we will turn Georgia blue in November. Thank you for standing with us in this fight. - Team Abrams
---

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Seeing through the smoke
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We must stop Zinke from using these fires as an excuse to sell off our public lands.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78010/2f5ea88d/7644131e/2cbc2029/3662486323/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/zinke-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-08-23_wildfires-petition-zinke-test&source=ema_2018-08-23_wildfires-petition-zinke-test&utm_campaign=wildfires-petition-zinke-test&utm_medium=emaa") Friend, I wrote to you yesterday about the massive wildfires ransacking our state and the West Coast. The air still hasn't cleared from all this smoke, and our brave firefighters are out there putting their lives on the line. At a time like this, you'd think we'd see leadership on a national level to call out the main culprit of these wildfires: climate change. But Secretary Zinke says that they have nothing to do with climate change. He blames them on "environmental terrorist organizations." He and his band of climate deniers are stubborn in their disregard for scientific fact. But there's something more than obstinance motivating Zinke's denial: profit. **Secretary Zinke and the Trump administration are using these fires as an excuse to clear cut our forests on public lands.** [**I think that's just plain wrong, and I hope you agree. We need real solutions to climate change -- not profit-driven logging. Sign our petition now to fight back!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78010/2f5ea88d/7644131e/2cbc2028/3662486323/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/zinke-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-08-23_wildfires-petition-zinke-test&source=ema_2018-08-23_wildfires-petition-zinke-test&utm_campaign=wildfires-petition-zinke-test&utm_medium=ema") | [SIGN THE PETITION »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78010/2f5ea88d/7644131e/2cbc2028/3662486323/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/zinke-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-08-23_wildfires-petition-zinke-test&source=ema_2018-08-23_wildfires-petition-zinke-test&utm_campaign=wildfires-petition-zinke-test&utm_medium=ema")
---
Cutting down thousands of trees to slow wildfires is a subject of debate among forestry scientists. _But even those who support forest thinning_ have called out Zinke for taking advantage of a climate-fueled disaster to profit his friends in the timber industry.
This is not an empty claim, friend. Zinke has a history of trying to garner public support for massive forest-clearing projects on public lands. His hometown in Montana was built on logging, and when he was a member of Congress, Zinke was notorious for using his position to prop up the timber industry. Now that he's sitting on 65 million acres of forests as Interior Secretary, he's pushing the same exact policies. **Zinke is using these wildfires as an opportunistic attempt to line the pockets of his friends by letting them**clear cut forests on our public lands**.**
We must to do everything we can to prevent wildfires from destroying our property and our forests. Forestry scientists agree that some degree of timber management may be reasonable, but Zinke is going way too far in catering to the timber industry. He's planning to make big money off of terrible disaster.
It's not the first time Zinke has tried to sell off our public lands. Just last week, the Trump administration released plans to sell off 1,610 acres of public lands from the downsized Grand Staircase and Bears Ears National Monuments. We've got to stop this guy.
**I firmly believe that our national lands are a national treasure, and we must do everything we can to protect them -- not sell them off to the highest bidder. That's why we need to fight climate change with smart policy, not by giving the timber industry the green light to cut down our forests.**
[**Sign our petition now to tell Zinke to back off from selling our national lands!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78010/2f5ea88d/7644131e/2cbc2028/3662486323/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/zinke-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-08-23_wildfires-petition-zinke-test&source=ema_2018-08-23_wildfires-petition-zinke-test&utm_campaign=wildfires-petition-zinke-test&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78010/2f5ea88d/7644131e/2cbc2028/3662486323/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/zinke-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-08-23_wildfires-petition-zinke-test&source=ema_2018-08-23_wildfires-petition-zinke-test&utm_campaign=wildfires-petition-zinke-test&utm_medium=ema")

The air still hasn't cleared from all this smoke, and our brave firefighters are out there putting their lives on the line. At a time like this, you'd think we'd see leadership on a national level to call out the main culprit of these wildfires: climate change. But Secretary Zinke says that they have nothing to do with climate change. He blames them on "environmental terrorist organizations." subject: help us STOP this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
body:
Peter, the Trump administration is trying to hide the fact that nearly 1,500 migrant minors are unaccounted for, and nearly 600 are still separated from their guardians. They promised the courts they'd get this fixed, but have failed to do so.

[**Congress needs to HEAR from voters that this cannot stand. Please sign your name to join the call as quick as you can -> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y0qqu2I6daPkf3BIhkCxg__HHioGZOErCRTuUqMEMgs=/lyfBgFAPRNopV7QTtr9VEVjlxeKYPldqe4mbqewnGyQ=)

**Begin forwarded message:**

> [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y0qqu2I6daPkf3BIhkCxg__HHioGZOErCRTuUqMEMgs=/8I3tAuwt1UKrbcJBsDxw0ZZIv2a_iImW8pAadgBkr6w=)
> **The Trump administration has failed to keep track of nearly 1,500 migrant children.**
> _The humanitarian crisis at our border is still ongoing._
> **TAKE ACTION: [Demand these children be found and reunited with their guardians.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y0qqu2I6daPkf3BIhkCxg__HHioGZOErCRTuUqMEMgs=/lyfBgFAPRNopV7QTtr9VEVjlxeKYPldqe4mbqewnGyQ=)**
> [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y0qqu2I6daPkf3BIhkCxg__HHioGZOErCRTuUqMEMgs=/D5hxRHOWONXKGaXSo6VssP5MqexxIfX74vaIU-29uCw=)
> * * *
> Peter,
>
> Nearly 1,500 migrant children who were taken into custody by our government are now unaccounted for. The Trump administration promised the courts, the media, and the public that they'd reunite the children with their families. But they haven't.
>
> We have an obligation to ensure that no child in America is abandoned, no matter who they are or where they're from. This administration has fallen far short of that obligation. The humanitarian crisis they created at our border is still destroying lives today.
>
> [**We need to show that voters are still watching and demanding a solution. Add your name here to continue the call for the reunification of ALL these children -> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y0qqu2I6daPkf3BIhkCxg__HHioGZOErCRTuUqMEMgs=/D5hxRHOWONXKGaXSo6VssP5MqexxIfX74vaIU-29uCw=)
>
> [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y0qqu2I6daPkf3BIhkCxg__HHioGZOErCRTuUqMEMgs=/D5hxRHOWONXKGaXSo6VssP5MqexxIfX74vaIU-29uCw=)
> Congress needs to move quickly to right these wrongs and reassert basic human decency into our policies at the border.
>
> These children are vulnerable and reliant on federal oversight to ensure they have a safe place to live.
>
> If the government continues to turn its back on them, it's up to us to make sure they're acknowledged.
>
> [**Sign your name here to join the call and demand the reunification of these children immediately.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y0qqu2I6daPkf3BIhkCxg__HHioGZOErCRTuUqMEMgs=/D5hxRHOWONXKGaXSo6VssP5MqexxIfX74vaIU-29uCw=)
>
> Thanks,
>
> Dan
>
>

>

>
>
>
> Thanks for your support of our campaign.
>

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: We have to tackle this from every angle:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | This week, I announced my clean energy vision that will move New Mexico's clean energy economy forward.

[**Learn more about my plan below, and show your support for my plan so we can make it a reality ->**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b6ac/43d8135f/67ed26fb/510038c0/4225559722/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://heinrich.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/clean-energy-vision?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Learn+more+about+my+plan+below+and+show+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180823_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180823_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180823_1_1")

* * *
Solar and wind energy jobs are two of the fastest growing careers in the country. It's clear clean energy is our future, and that is why I announced my clean energy vision for New Mexico so we can be a leader in this expanding sector.

If we're going to modernize our energy infrastructure and our economy, we have to tackle this from every angle. That means:

* Investing in wind and solar energy to create more jobs and build more capacity
* Helping small businesses, local governments, and communities access clean energy
* Repealing President Trump's solar tariffs that slow development and economic progress
* Developing infrastructure to export clean energy to other states and regions

[**We need to dream big if we are going to revolutionize our economy and our energy infrastructure. That 's why I need you with me.**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b6ac/43d8135f/67ed26fb/510038c3/4225559722/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://heinrich.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/clean-energy-vision?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+We+need+to+dream+big+if+we+are+going+to+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180823_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180823_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180823_1_1")
**[SUPPORT MARTIN'S VISION](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b6ac/43d8135f/67ed26fb/510038c2/4225559722/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://heinrich.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/clean-energy-vision?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+SUPPORT+MARTINrsquoS+VISION&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180823_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180823_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180823_1_1")** I wanted my newest campaign ad to focus on my clean energy vision so I can share my work to move New Mexico's energy economy forward. Now is not the time for half-hearted measures or even outright denials about the importance of clean energy.

[**I am working to gather support for my clean energy vision, but I need you with me. We need 10,000 supporters to step up and show they support my plan -- will you add your name today and show you support clean energy? Sign on here ->**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b6ac/43d8135f/67ed26fb/510038c5/4225559722/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://heinrich.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/clean-energy-vision?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+I+am+working+to+gather+support+for+my+cl&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180823_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180823_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180823_1_1")

Thanks for standing with me, and I'll keep you updated on ways we can keep moving this issue forward.

\-- Martin

clean_body: | | | | This week, I announced my clean energy vision that will move New Mexico's clean energy economy forward. "" Solar and wind energy jobs are two of the fastest growing careers in the country. It's clear clean energy is our future, and that is why I announced my clean energy vision for New Mexico so we can be a leader in this expanding sector. If we're going to modernize our energy infrastructure and our economy, we have to tackle this from every angle. That means: Investing in wind and solar energy to create more jobs and build more capacity Helping small businesses, local governments, and communities access clean energy Repealing President Trump's solar tariffs that slow development and economic progress Developing infrastructure to export clean energy to other states and regions "" "" I wanted my newest campaign ad to focus on my clean energy vision so I can share my work to move New Mexico's energy economy forward. Now is not the time for half-hearted measures or even outright denials about the importance of clean energy. "" Thanks for standing with me, and I'll keep you updated on ways we can keep moving this issue forward. \-- Martin | PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends! ---|---
| Friend,
---
| **The Governor’s opponent has repeatedly said, “no new taxes is a no-brain activity,” suggesting that smart people want to raise taxes. WHAT?!?!?!** This is insulting to hardworking Vermonters and businesses who are struggling with Vermont’s affordability crisis.
We have an entirely different take, and we believe most Vermonters would agree!
**It takes hard work, innovative thinking and conviction to build a budget that doesn’t raise taxes.** And that’s why the Governor has set clear priorities, streamlined services, and made government more efficient to ensure taxes did not increase. **This is leadership, and what Vermonters elected him to do.**
With determination, and the courage to do things differently, Governor Scott has made critical investments to spur economic development; combat the opioid epidemic; and boost early care and learning, higher education and trades training -- without raising a single tax or fee!
**He’ll continue this fight against taxes because he understands Vermonters cannot afford anymore, and he knows we can still make pro-growth investments within existing resources.**
Vermonters cannot afford to go back to one party controlling Montpelier, because that would mean higher taxes and unsustainable budgets. **That’s why we need your support to continue our fight to grow the economy and make Vermont more affordable.**
[Can Governor Scott count on you to help fuel us to victory in November?](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=e97cfc2ad2&e=19cebfe173)
Thank you, Brittney Wilson
Campaign Manager

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: No Records, No Hearings for Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friends, Donald Trump was just implicated in a criminal conspiracy, but Republicans are _still _trying to force through his Supreme Court nominee - Brett Kavanaugh - without even knowing Kavanaugh's stance on presidential abuse of power.
**Here's what I need to know: Does Kavanaugh believe that Trump is above the law? Or does he think the Supreme Court should be a check on the president? **

This isn't theoretical. The president's possible criminal actions may come in front of the Supreme Court in _a matter of months_. And as it stands today, without his full records, we have _no way _of knowing whether Kavanaugh could deliver impartial and unbiased judgment.

**I'm not taking that chance, so I'm calling on my colleagues in the Senate to delay hearings on Kavanaugh's confirmation until we can find out what he really thinks about executive power. But Friends, I need to know that you're with me.[Add your name right](https://petitions.signforgood.com/cjs-scotushearing?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=shaheen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fcjs-scotushearing%3Fcode%3Djtk908-ja-nd)[ now to tell Senate Republicans: no records, no hearing!](https://petitions.signforgood.com/cjs-scotushearing?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=shaheen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fcjs-scotushearing%3Fcode%3Djtk908-ja-nd)**
Thank you for standing up for this democracy.

Jeanne

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](http://www.democratsenators.org/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=WIIRdzLt4OUEaYuyIKGha4ZuwyVz5uLa&url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.democratsenators.org%2Fo%2F23%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2F%3FEmail%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D) | | Paid for by Shaheen for Senate

body:
Our elected leaders to be held accountable for any corrupt actions -- whether they are actions by our representatives, the president's campaign, or the White House.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.

We have this momentum thanks to you--our movement to flip CA-04 is made up of people just like you, all over the district, who're ready to elect new and better leadership. We're so grateful for your support.

clean_body: Team, as you saw in Tuesday's , momentum is on our side with 75 days to go until Election Day. We have this momentum thanks to you--our movement to flip CA-04 is made up of people just like you, all over the district, who're ready to elect new and better leadership. We're so grateful for your support. But we know the reality: elections aren 't won because of enthusiasm and momentum alone. We need resources to convert our momentum into ballots cast for Jessica on Election Day--can you chip in now to make sure we have everything we need to win? | ---|--- | | Momentum helps --but it doesn't change the fact that Tom McClintock is an incumbent Congressman and that special interests and wealthy donors are ready to flood this race with money to keep him in office. This grassroots team has shown heart, determination and strength--now, we need the funds to get our message out, talk to voters across the district, and take this race across the finish line. We can flip this district, and we can defeat Tom McClintock --with your help. Thank you, Team Morse Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign. name: Mark Warner
subject: Corey Stewart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, the contrast between Tim Kaine's campaign and Corey Stewart's has never been starker than it was this month. ---------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, the contrast between Tim Kaine's campaign and Corey Stewart's has never been starker than it was this month.

**When we were approaching the one-year anniversary of the horrible white supremacist rally in Charlottesville:**
* \-- Tim asked his supporters to take a pledge to stand up against hate, bringing thousands of people from all over the country together to send a message: _Hate is not a Virginian value._

* \-- And Corey Stewart doubled down on his comments from last year agreeing with President Trump that there were good people on both sides in Charlottesville and saying it's time for us to blithely "move on" from that hate-filled rally which cost three Virginians their lives.

[Will you show Corey Stewart that his attempts to sow hate and division won't win in Virginia by chipping in $5 to Tim's campaign today?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1157/3e0906/6ccc7ce1/3e36b89f/2936647001/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180823_2_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate-LDND-RS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+show+Corey+Stewart+that+his+att&utm_campaign=20180823_2_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate-LDND-RS&source=20180823_2_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate-LDND-RS") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1157/3e0906/6ccc7ce1/3e36b89e/2936647001/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180823_2_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate-LDND-RS_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180823_2_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate-LDND-RS&source=20180823_2_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate-LDND-RS")

To put it simply, Derek: **Tim 's main priority is to unite folks, and Corey's is to divide us.**

This year's election is bigger than Virginia - it's about proving that hatred and division aren't winning campaign strategies. And we can't prove that without your help.

[So if you're with us, donate whatever you can afford to Tim's campaign today >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1157/3e0906/6ccc7ce1/3e36b892/2936647001/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180823_2_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate-LDND-RS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+So+if+yoursquore+with+us+donate++if+cont&utm_campaign=20180823_2_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate-LDND-RS&source=20180823_2_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate-LDND-RS")

Thanks for being on Team Kaine,

_Mark Warner_

P.S. You and I both know things are only going to get uglier from here, so help make sure Tim can run a positive campaign from now through November by [making a recurring donation through Election Day >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1157/3e0906/6ccc7ce1/3e36b891/2936647001/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-recurring-fund?refcode=20180823_2_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate-LDND-RS&amount=25&recurring=4&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+making+a+recurring+donation+through+Elec&utm_campaign=20180823_2_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate-LDND-RS&source=20180823_2_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate-LDND-RS")

name: BREAKING (via Sinema HQ)
subject: a baseless attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate just attacked Kyrsten. |
---
| | **_BREAKING: Mitch McConnell 's handpicked candidate in Arizona just launched a [desperate attack ad against Kyrsten,](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-first-attack?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+desperate+attack+ad+against+Kyrsten&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1") questioning her patriotism and support for our troops.

[_We need YOUR help to fight back against these baseless smears. Chip in $10 now to our Emergency Rapid Response Fund so we can get the truth out about Kyrsten 's record. >>_](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-first-attack?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+We+need+YOUR+help+to+fight+back+against+&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1") _**
---

Team,

Republican Martha McSally just launched a desperate attack ad on Kyrsten. Reports say the ad buy is worth hundreds of thousands of dollars, and it's just the tip of the iceberg on what our opponents will spend to try and tear down a strong woman like Kyrsten.

This is a big moment: Kyrsten needs all her supporters to step up with a contribution today so our campaign can fight back against McSally's desperate, baseless attacks.

[**Can you donate $10 now to our Emergency Rapid Response Fund? We need to raise $25,000 today to respond to the Republicans ' desperate, negative attack.**](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-first-attack?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=3+-+Can+you+donate+ask+now+to+our+Emergency+&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1")

**[DONATE $10](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-first-attack?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=4+-++if+consfirstname+++consfirstname++upper&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1")**

Make no mistake -- this is a desperate attack ad. Questioning your opponent's support for our troops isn't something you do when your campaign is doing well.

It's something you do when your campaign is flailing because of your deeply unpopular agenda and support for things like allowing an age tax on older Arizonans and threatening care for people with pre-existing conditions.

**[Here's the truth: Kyrsten has a strong track record of fighting for our military and veterans. She's worked hard to keep our country safe and help pass laws to take better care of our vets.](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-first-attack?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=5+-+Herersquos+the+truth+Kyrsten+has+a+stron&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1")**

With your help, we can counter McSally's negative smear with the truth -- and share Kyrsten's positive record of getting things done for Arizonans across the state.

But if we fall short of our $25,000 goal, we'll lose ground during this critical moment for the campaign.

[**Friend, please contribute $10 or more today and help us fight back against this desperate attack. >>**](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-first-attack?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=6+-+FIRSTNAMEFriend+please+contribute+ask+or&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180823_1_1")
