name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Will we take this seriously?
body:
Peter,
I’ve read a myriad of election analyst’s opinions on the upcoming November elections and there is one point on which most everyone agrees – the U.S. House of Representatives is entirely undecided.
Both Republicans and Democrats are vying for control, and all 435 House seats will be contested.
Thirty-seven Republicans have chosen not to run for reelection, handing an advantage to the Democratic Party.
Election history reveals when a political party controls both houses of Congress and the presidency in a mid-term election, then on average, they lose 33 House seats. Democrats only need to win 24 seats to control the house!
Experts are speculating, “Which party will be more energized to turn out and vote this election season?”
As always, it comes down to we, the people. How seriously will we take our responsibility to vote this election?
**More specifically, will Christians take the election seriously? Some estimate over 50 million Christians will fail to vote in the midterm elections this year.**
We number over 90-million Christians in the United States. If we all vote, we choose the values we want to be represented in the U.S. House.
**[We are only 74 days away from the November election. We must quickly reach millions of unengaged Christians to vote and protect biblical values](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180823apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180823apl01nd&n=1)!**
We know how to accomplish this because, in 2016, My Faith Votes launched an aggressive media campaign to activate Jesus-followers to stand united at the polls – and it worked!
We produced and distributed Public Service Announcements to more than 1,100 Christian radio stations and 27 different Christian television stations. These efforts reached over 140 million households through TV and radio alone.
And we leveraged social media to reach 1.5 million like-minded faith voters per day in the weeks leading up to the election.
If we hope to continue a movement of turning faith into action at the polls then we must utilize radio, TV, and digital media to reach people quickly and inspire them to action.
We’ve already invested in developing high-quality Public Service Announcements (PSAs) to reach Christian voters through TV and radio. What we need now is to raise the funds to get these PSAs played across the country.
With your help, these messages will play in every Christian household in America – not just once – but multiple times.
The hard part is done. Each PSA has been produced and is ready to go, but the reach of the announcements directly depends on your donations. Your support will determine how many people hear them and how often each PSA will be played.
Elections are going to be close across the nation, but we can make the difference– if we can reach enough Christians and encourage them to vote!
**[Will you please make your best donation today to help us fully fund this national media campaign to awaken voters to stand at the polls for biblical principles](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180823apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180823apl01nd&n=2)? **
Your donation will challenge others to turn their faith into action by voting! Our goal this election is to reach over 150 million households.
**[Help us fund this proven national media campaign to place “faith-based get-out-the-vote” messages in homes across the country](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180823apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180823apl01nd&n=3). **
When you make a donation to My Faith Votes the frequency of our message grows and the impact multiplies.
The nation is watching. Many believe the liberal progressives will turn out in record numbers to vote this November. But with your help, we’re going to surprise the nation with an overwhelming voter turn out of 90-million Christians to stand for biblical values!
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180823apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180823apl01nd&n=4)
I hope I can count on you to stand with me in this mission.
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180823apl01nd&n=5)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180823apl01nd&n=6).

name: Kathy Manning
subject: 75 days to go...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | We've reached another milestone in this campaign -- **75 days until Election Day!** By all accounts, we're moving in the right direction. We're getting national media attention. Analysts have upgraded the competitiveness of the race. We're hitting goals, recruiting volunteers, and making all the right moves. But even one wrong turn could turn all this success around. **The Heritage Action, an extreme Washington special interest group, has pledged to spend up to $400,000 against us.** We need to be prepared to counter that. **We have a big goal coming up at the end of this month, and we're tracking a little behind right now.[Can you give $7.50 on this 75-Day milestone to help us make up some ground?](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279fe/e3b7d3/5dcc5c64/25552f0e/3648632070/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180823?refcode=kme180823_m&recurring=true&amount=7.5")** I remember when I first decided to run. No one thought this would be a competitive race. They thought my opponent, Rep. Ted Budd, was so deep in the special interests pockets that no one could touch him. But the families in this district see it differently. They're ready for change and they're fighting for it, every single day. It's been a long road so far, but we've taken all the bumps, twists, and turns in stride. As long as we keep it up for the next 75 days, I know we can win. [**A single missed goal could throw us off course. If you can, rush in $7.50 toward our $45,000 August goal >>**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279fe/e3b7d3/5dcc5c64/25552f0e/3648632070/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180823?refcode=kme180823_m&recurring=true&amount=7.5") Together, we can take this road all the way to victory in November. Thanks so much for all of your support. Kathy
---

|
---

---

subject: We're on TV!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:

Friends, We just launched our first TV ad! Thanks to your support, we are able to spread our message of building a New Hampshire where everyone has the opportunity to succeed across the Granite State. The ad, "Table," features Molly's life story from when she was a single mom who raised three small children while working her way through college and law school before becoming a financial advisor and New Hampshire state senator. **[Click here to watch our ad](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc491b/d0ce7de/51fb0a04/9cd4573/3899651222/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVjlmUT09IjoibW9sbHlvbnR2IiwiZTN0TVVFRkJVWFZsY25sVGRISnBibWQ5ZlE9PSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoianRrOTktZnItbmQifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mollyontv?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=jtk99-fr-nd")** [](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc491b/d0ce7de/51fb0a04/9cd4573/3899651222/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVjlmUT09IjoibW9sbHlvbnR2IiwiZTN0TVVFRkJVWFZsY25sVGRISnBibWQ5ZlE9PSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoianRrOTktZnItbmQifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mollyontv?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=jtk99-fr-nd") The ad highlights that Molly will open opportunities for everyone in New Hampshire and that she is refusing corporate contributions to her campaign. body:
**NEW POLL: Menendez leads GOP challenger by just 6 points in New Jersey Senate race.**
_-The Hill, 08/22/2018_

[**This race is too close. Your donation of $3 can help change that. Donate now.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cbe/3af3c5d/3a47b50a/4ec3f1f4/2841227554/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_newpolling?gpsid=5_73_3055&refcode=em18_180823_NewPol_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180823_NewPol_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+This+race+is+too+close+Your+donation+of+") **[DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cbe/3af3c5d/3a47b50a/4ec3f1f7/2841227554/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_newpolling?gpsid=5_73_3055&refcode=em18_180823_NewPol_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180823_NewPol_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+DONATE")**
Friend,

It's not a surprise that the latest public poll shows Bob Hugin within 6 points of buying this seat for Donald Trump.

He's spent millions on misleading television ads that hide the truth about his positions on the issues that matter most to New Jersey families.

With 75 days left in this election, it's never mattered more for Democrats to stand with Democratic Senator Bob Menendez and stop Bob Hugin from buying this race.

[**If you stand with Democratic Senator Bob Menendez, we need your support, now more than ever. Chip in $3 or more right now.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cbe/3af3c5d/3a47b50a/4ec3f1f6/2841227554/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_newpolling?gpsid=5_73_3055&refcode=em18_180823_NewPol_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180823_NewPol_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+If+you+stand+with+Democratic+Senator+Bob")

Too many New Jersey voters still don't know Bob Hugin is a Trump supporter who made millions ripping off cancer patients.

That's why we are on the air with two TV ads - one reminding voters that Bob Menendez is the Democrat who is fighting for affordable health care, equal pay, and lower prescription drug costs and another one that tells the truth about Bob Hugin.

But Hugin is committed to using his money to drown out our message and hide his disgusting past. Your donation will help keep these ads on the air, spreading the truth to New Jersey voters and help us win this election. It's never mattered more.

[**We need your support to win this race for the people of New Jersey. Chip in $3 or more right now to make sure that Democratic Senator Bob Menendez has what it takes to stop Trump supporter Bob Hugin from winning in November.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cbe/3af3c5d/3a47b50a/4ec3f1e9/2841227554/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_newpolling?gpsid=5_73_3055&refcode=em18_180823_NewPol_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180823_NewPol_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=4+-+We+need+your+support+to+win+this+race+fo")

Thank you,

Erin

Erin Dolan
Menendez for Senate

**[Donate](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cbe/3af3c5d/3a47b50a/4ec3f1e8/2841227554/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_newpolling?gpsid=5_73_3055&refcode=em18_180823_NewPol_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180823_NewPol_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=5+-+Donate")**

name: Ralph
subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
| | |
---
3D-printed guns pose a dangerous risk to our communities, friends. They're untraceable, unregulated, and don't require a background check to obtain, letting any person--let that sink in; _any person_ --print a gun in their own home.
Thankfully, attorneys general across the country, including Virginia's own Mark Herring, have filed a lawsuit to protect our communities and prevent further loopholes in our current gun regulations like 3D-printed guns.
When I asked you to weigh in on this issue, thousands of you responded to the call--so from the bottom of my heart, thank you. But right now, I need your help again on this important issue. We have to take a stand and do what's right, what's common-sense.
**We need 500 people from your area to add their names and speak out about these dangerous, unregulated 3D-printed guns right now. Can I count on you to add your name to protect innocent Virginians?**

| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.ralphnortham. "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopghostGuns?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=thewayahead&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Ftwa-3dguns%3Fcode%3Djtk315-ja-nd")
---
Take care,

--Ralph
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
